Report.title: Report
Report.description: A saved PGx Clinical Report containing gene variant pharmacology analysis and therapeutic recommendations.

patientId.description: The customized or anonymous patient identifier (e.g., PAT-4912).

phenotype.description: The patient's metabolizer phenotype (e.g., Poor Metabolizer).

explanation.description: Full therapeutic interpretation and metabolism guidance.

sessionId.description: The unique guest browser session ID to sync history securely.

ageGroup.description: The age demographic classification (Pediatric, Adult, Geriatric).

timestamp.description: Chronological stamp when report was compiled.

reports.description: A collection of PGx assessment logs, synced via anonymous guest browser session IDs.
